summary: Added a deterministic human-approved playbook mapping helper for ProfessionalSkill records. The mapper keeps candidate skills inactive and marks skills active only when backed by an approved playbook record with approval identity and timestamp.
testsRun: cd frontend && rm -rf /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests && npx tsc -p tests/agentops/tsconfig.adapter.json && node --test /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/adapters.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/handoff.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/exportPackage.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/skillsEval.test.js
cd frontend && npx eslint src/lib/agentops/skills.ts tests/agentops/skillsEval.test.ts
risks: Playbook mapping is a frontend deterministic view/helper; it does not persist playbooks or approve skills.
Generated skill suggestions remain candidate-only and must be mapped to human-approved matter playbooks before activation.
Generic /aletheia/agentops still has fixture-backed behavior through MatterCommandCenter defaults; product-truth use should stay on the matter-scoped adapter-backed route.
needs: Feed persisted AletheiaPlaybookRecord data into the approval-state mapper where an Eval Snapshot or playbook review UI needs explicit active/inactive state.
Add audit snapshot provenance for candidate skill IDs and approved playbook IDs before treating eval snapshots as durable learning records.
last_cycle_summary: Added playbook approval-state mapping for ProfessionalSkill records and tests proving candidates stay inactive while approved playbook-backed skills become active.
eval_features_added: None this cycle; eval metric behavior remained unchanged.
skills_features_added: mapSkillsToPlaybookApprovalState maps skills to persisted playbook approval records without mutating skill approval status.
Runtime test coverage proves candidate skills remain inactive and approved skills require approved playbook backing.
tests_run: cd frontend && rm -rf /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests && npx tsc -p tests/agentops/tsconfig.adapter.json && node --test /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/adapters.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/handoff.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/exportPackage.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/skillsEval.test.js
cd frontend && npx eslint src/lib/agentops/skills.ts tests/agentops/skillsEval.test.ts
next_actions: Feed persisted AletheiaPlaybookRecord data into the approval-state mapper in the Eval Workbench or snapshot provenance layer.
Add candidate skill and approved playbook IDs to eval snapshot provenance before persistence.
